items.title: Noninferiority of Randomly Assigned Telehealth and Center-Based Regional Exercise-Based Cardiac Rehabilitation Programs When Delivered With High Fidelity.
items.summary: A randomized study demonstrated noninferiority in cardiorespiratory fitness changes between telehealth-delivered and center-based exercise-based cardiac rehabilitation programs when delivered with high fidelity, validating telehealth effectiveness.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提供了远程和中心基地运动心脏康复项目非劣效性的有力证据，特别是当高依从性执行时。这意味着远程心脏康复并非“退而求其次”，而是一个有效且可行的替代方案，在推广可及性方面具有重要价值。在资源有限或患者出行不便时，你可以放心地推荐远程模式。
items.titleZh: 高依从性执行时随机分配的远程和中心基地运动心脏康复项目非劣效性比较
items.summaryZh: 一项随机研究表明，在以高依从性执行时，远程和中心基地运动心脏康复项目在心肺适能改善方面具有非劣效性，证实了远程医疗的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study provides strong evidence for the noninferiority of telehealth and center-based exercise-based cardiac rehabilitation programs, especially when delivered with high fidelity. This means telehealth cardiac rehabilitation is not a 'second-best' option but an effective and viable alternative, holding significant value in promoting accessibility. You can confidently recommend the telehealth model when resources are limited or patient travel is inconvenient.

items.title: Cardiorespiratory Exercise Intensity Prescription in Cardiovascular Rehabilitation: Do Updated Guideline Recommendations Reflect Real Individual Effort Responses?
items.summary: A retrospective multicenter study of 2554 individuals with cardiometabolic disease found that updated AHA/AACVPR Scientific Statement recommendations for moderate-intensity exercise based on %HRR may inaccurately reflect individual effort responses, often overestimating intensity.
items.curatedReason: 这项大规模多中心研究评估了AHA/AACVPR指南的心脏康复运动强度处方准确性，发现其在心血管代谢疾病患者中可能高估了中等强度。这对你日常执行指南和个体化运动处方具有直接指导意义：单纯基于%HRR可能导致强度过高，需要结合其他生理指标进行精确调整。
items.titleZh: 心血管康复中呼吸循环运动强度处方：更新指南建议是否反映了真实的个体努力反应？
items.summaryZh: 一项对2554名心血管代谢疾病患者的回顾性多中心研究发现，AHA/AACVPR科学声明中基于%HRR的中等强度运动建议可能无法准确反映个体实际努力反应，常会高估运动强度。
items.curatedReasonEn: This large multicenter study evaluated the accuracy of AHA/AACVPR guideline exercise intensity prescriptions in cardiac rehabilitation, finding that they may overestimate moderate intensity in cardiometabolic disease patients. This has direct implications for your daily guideline adherence and individualized exercise prescription: solely relying on %HRR may lead to excessively high intensity, requiring precise adjustments with other physiological indicators.

items.title: Effectiveness of Radial Extracorporeal Shockwave Therapy Versus Other Electrophysical Modalities on Pain and Functionality in Patients With Plantar Fasciitis: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis found radial extracorporeal shockwave therapy (rESWT) effective for pain and functionality in plantar fasciitis patients, comparing it with other electrophysical modalities.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析证实了径向体外冲击波疗法（rESWT）在治疗足底筋膜炎方面的有效性，并与其它电物理疗法进行了比较。当面对慢性足底筋膜炎患者时，rESWT应被视为一线物理治疗选择，其疗效和成本效益已得到较强证据支持。
items.titleZh: 径向体外冲击波疗法与其他电物理疗法对足底筋膜炎患者疼痛和功能影响的有效性：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析发现，径向体外冲击波疗法（rESWT）在治疗足底筋膜炎患者的疼痛和功能方面有效，并与其它电物理疗法进行了比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis confirmed the effectiveness of radial extracorporeal shockwave therapy (rESWT) for plantar fasciitis, comparing it to other electrophysical modalities. When treating chronic plantar fasciitis, rESWT should be considered a first-line physical therapy option, supported by strong evidence for its efficacy and cost-effectiveness.

items.title: Impact of balneotherapy on drug consumption: a systematic review and an economic evaluation of drug deprescribing.
items.summary: A systematic review and economic evaluation found that balneotherapy may lead to decreased drug consumption and associated monetary savings, with potential implications for pharmacoeconomics.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和药物去处方经济学评估表明，水疗可能通过减少药物消耗带来经济效益。将水疗纳入康复计划时，除了临床效果，其对医疗成本的潜在影响也是一个值得考量的维度。
items.titleZh: 水疗对药物消耗的影响：一项系统综述及药物去处方的经济学评估
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和经济学评估发现，水疗可能与药物消耗减少相关，并带来经济效益，提示其在药物去处方方面具有潜在价值。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and pharmacoeconomic evaluation suggests balneotherapy may offer economic benefits by reducing drug consumption. When integrating balneotherapy into rehabilitation plans, consider its potential impact on healthcare costs alongside clinical outcomes.

items.title: Functional outcomes post-stroke: Evidence from private rehabilitation facilities in South Africa between 2006 and 2023.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 9010 stroke patients in South African private rehabilitation facilities between 2006 and 2023 evaluated functional outcomes, providing insights into rehabilitation effectiveness.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列研究涵盖了大量卒中患者的康复数据，为私立康复机构的卒中功能预后提供了宝贵的区域性见解。了解这些模式有助于优化康复服务策略，尤其是在评估不同医疗环境下的康复效果时。
items.titleZh: 卒中后功能预后：2006至2023年南非私立康复机构的证据
items.summaryZh: 一项对2006至2023年间南非私立康复机构中9010名卒中患者的回顾性队列研究，评估了其功能预后，为康复效果提供了见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: This large retrospective cohort study provides valuable regional insights into stroke functional outcomes within private rehabilitation facilities. Understanding these patterns helps optimize rehabilitation service strategies, especially when evaluating outcomes across different healthcare settings.

items.title: Tennis leg: Diagnosis and management - A state-of-the-art review.
items.summary: A state-of-the-art review provides current evidence on the diagnosis and conservative management of "tennis leg" (medial gastrocnemius-soleus junction injuries), emphasizing clinical diagnosis and imaging for severity.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述为“网球腿”的诊断和保守治疗提供了全面的最新证据。在临床实践中，可参考其推荐的诊断流程和保守治疗策略，指导患者重返运动。
items.titleZh: 网球腿：诊断与管理——最新综述
items.summaryZh: 一篇最新综述提供了“网球腿”（腓肠肌内侧-比目鱼肌交界处损伤）的诊断和保守治疗证据，强调临床诊断和影像学评估损伤严重性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This state-of-the-art review offers comprehensive, updated evidence for the diagnosis and conservative management of "tennis leg." Use its recommended diagnostic workflow and conservative treatment strategies to guide patients back to sport.

items.title: Bidirectional Association Between Lifestyle and Cognitive Function in Aging Adults.
items.summary: A longitudinal study using data from the Korean Longitudinal Study of Aging (2006-2020) revealed bidirectional associations between lifestyle factors (physiological and psychosocial) and cognitive function in middle- and older adults.
items.curatedReason: 这项长期队列研究在韩国老年人群中发现生活方式与认知功能之间存在双向关联，强调了整合生理和心理社会因素的干预对维持老年人认知健康的价值。在老年康复中，应把生活方式干预放在核心位置。
items.titleZh: 老年人生活方式与认知功能之间的双向关联
items.summaryZh: 一项利用韩国老年人纵向研究（2006-2020）数据的研究揭示了中老年人生理和心理社会生活方式因素与认知功能之间的双向关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This longitudinal cohort study in older Korean adults found a bidirectional association between lifestyle and cognitive function, emphasizing the value of integrated physiological and psychosocial interventions for maintaining cognitive health in older adults. In geriatric rehabilitation, you must prioritize lifestyle interventions.

items.title: Prognostic value of distance-saturation product in COPD: Korean nationwide cohort study.
items.summary: A Korean nationwide cohort study validated the distance-saturation product (DSP) as a prognostic marker in COPD, identifying its utility and optimal threshold in Asian populations for predicting mortality risk.
items.curatedReason: 这项韩国全国性队列研究确认了距离-饱和度乘积（DSP）在COPD患者中的预后价值，并首次针对亚洲人群确定了其最佳阈值。将DSP纳入你的COPD患者评估体系，尤其是在预测死亡风险和个体化康复目标设置时，能提供更精确的风险分层。
items.titleZh: 距离-饱和度乘积在COPD中的预后价值：韩国全国队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项韩国全国性队列研究证实了距离-饱和度乘积（DSP）在COPD患者中的预后价值，并首次确定了其在亚洲人群中预测死亡风险的效用和最佳阈值。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Korean nationwide cohort study confirmed the prognostic value of the distance-saturation product (DSP) in COPD patients and established its optimal threshold for Asian populations for the first time. Incorporating DSP into your COPD patient assessment, especially for predicting mortality risk and setting individualized rehabilitation goals, will provide more precise risk stratification.

items.title: Safety and Feasibility of an Asynchronous AI-Integrated Tele-Pulmonary Rehabilitation Application Among Patients with COPD.
items.summary: A study confirmed the safety and feasibility of an asynchronous AI-integrated tele-pulmonary rehabilitation application for patients with COPD, addressing limited utilization of traditional PR programs.
items.titleZh: 异步AI集成远程肺康复应用在COPD患者中的安全性与可行性
items.summaryZh: 一项研究证实了异步AI集成远程肺康复应用在COPD患者中的安全性和可行性，旨在解决传统肺康复项目利用率有限的问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study demonstrates the safety and feasibility of an asynchronous AI-integrated tele-pulmonary rehabilitation application for COPD patients. This offers a new solution to expand COPD rehabilitation accessibility, especially for patients with geographical or time constraints. You can now more confidently explore and apply this innovative telehealth model.

items.title: Assessing the Exercise Intensity of Patients With Cardiovascular Disease: DEVELOPMENT AND VALIDATION OF A TREADMILL TALK TEST PROTOCOL.
items.summary: This study developed and validated a treadmill talk test protocol, based on 6-minute walk test predicted average speed, to assess exercise intensity in adults with cardiovascular disease.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究开发并验证了基于6分钟步行试验预测平均速度的跑步机谈话测试方案，为评估心血管疾病患者运动强度提供了新的、简便的工具。将其纳入你的临床实践，可以更灵活地个体化运动强度处方，尤其适用于那些无法进行复杂心肺运动测试的患者。
items.titleZh: 心血管疾病患者运动强度评估：跑步机谈话测试方案的开发与验证
items.summaryZh: 本研究开发并验证了一种基于6分钟步行试验预测平均速度的跑步机谈话测试方案，用于评估心血管疾病成年患者的运动强度。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study developed and validated a treadmill talk test protocol based on 6-minute walk test predicted average speed, providing a new, simple tool for assessing exercise intensity in cardiovascular disease patients. Incorporating this into your clinical practice allows for more flexible individualized exercise intensity prescriptions, especially for patients unable to undergo complex cardiopulmonary exercise tests.

items.title: Effects of foot-specific exercise with or without taping on navicular drop, foot posture, and plantar pressure: A randomized comparative trial.
items.summary: A randomized comparative trial of 34 individuals with bilateral flatfoot found that foot-specific exercise, with or without taping, improved navicular drop, foot posture, and plantar pressure.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明，足部专项训练结合或不结合贴扎均能改善扁平足患者的足舟骨下降、足部姿势和足底压力。这意味着足部专项训练是核心，贴扎可作为辅助手段，但并非必需。在临床实践中，应优先强调主动的肌肉训练。
items.titleZh: 足部专项训练结合或不结合贴扎对足舟骨下降、足部姿势和足底压力的影响：一项随机比较试验
items.summaryZh: 一项对34名双侧扁平足患者进行的随机比较试验发现，足部专项训练结合或不结合贴扎均能改善足舟骨下降、足部姿势和足底压力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized comparative trial demonstrates that foot-specific exercise, with or without taping, improves navicular drop, foot posture, and plantar pressure in flatfoot patients. This means foot-specific exercise is core, and taping can be an adjunct but is not essential. In clinical practice, prioritize active muscle training.

items.title: Transforming chronic low back pain management in Bangladesh: implications for rehabilitation in low- and middle-income countries.
items.summary: This study examines the challenges and implications for rehabilitation in transforming chronic low back pain management in Bangladesh, a growing public health challenge in low- and middle-income countries.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究聚焦孟加拉国慢性腰痛管理，强调了中低收入国家在解决这一全球致残主要原因方面的挑战和机遇。这提示你，在全球健康框架下，康复专业人员在推动政策改进和适应性干预方面扮演着关键角色，尤其是在资源受限的环境中。
items.titleZh: 孟加拉国慢性腰痛管理转型：对中低收入国家康复的启示
items.summaryZh: 本研究探讨了孟加拉国慢性腰痛管理转型的挑战及其对中低收入国家康复的启示，慢性腰痛在全球范围内日益成为一个公共卫生挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study focuses on chronic low back pain management in Bangladesh, highlighting the challenges and opportunities for low- and middle-income countries in addressing this leading global cause of disability. This suggests that within a global health framework, rehabilitation professionals play a crucial role in driving policy improvements and adaptive interventions, especially in resource-constrained environments.

items.title: Physiotherapists' perception of barriers and facilitators to the implementation of digital health interventions: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review summarized physical therapists' perceptions of barriers and facilitators to implementing digital health interventions (DHIs), highlighting challenges despite DHIs' potential to enhance physiotherapy.
items.curatedReason: 这项综述总结了物理治疗师对数字健康干预（DHIs）实施障碍和促进因素的看法。它明确指出，尽管DHIs潜力巨大，但实际应用存在阻力。作为临床医师，你应该了解这些障碍，并积极参与到DHIs的设计和评估中，以推动其更有效、更广泛地融入日常实践。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师对数字健康干预实施障碍和促进因素的看法：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述总结了物理治疗师对数字健康干预（DHIs）实施障碍和促进因素的看法，强调了尽管DHIs在增强物理治疗方面潜力巨大，但仍面临挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review summarizes physical therapists' perceptions of barriers and facilitators to implementing digital health interventions (DHIs). It explicitly states that despite the immense potential of DHIs, there are resistances to their actual application. As a clinician, you should understand these barriers and actively participate in the design and evaluation of DHIs to promote their more effective and widespread integration into daily practice.

items.title: [Sleep architecture changes and their impact on short-term ischemic stroke functional outcome].
items.summary: An observational cohort study of 78 acute ischemic stroke patients found an association between sleep macrostructure parameters and short-term post-stroke functional outcome (mRS at discharge).
items.curatedReason: 这项观察性研究提示卒中后睡眠结构改变与短期功能预后有关。在神经康复中，应关注患者的睡眠管理，将其视为影响康复效果的潜在因素。
items.titleZh: 睡眠结构改变及其对短期缺血性卒中功能预后的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项对78名急性缺血性卒中患者的观察性队列研究发现，睡眠宏观结构参数与卒中后短期功能预后（出院时mRS评分）之间存在关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study suggests a link between altered sleep architecture and short-term functional outcomes post-stroke. In neurorehabilitation, prioritize sleep management as a potential factor influencing recovery.

items.title: We Thought You'd Never Ask: Insights From the Health of Elite Retired Australian Female Athletes Survey.
items.summary: A survey of elite retired Australian female athletes found insights into their long-term mental, brain, cardiovascular, musculoskeletal health, and general well-being, highlighting historical underrepresentation in research.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对澳大利亚精英女性退役运动员健康状况的调查，揭示了她们在心理、脑部、心血管和肌肉骨骼健康方面的长期挑战。在运动康复中，应更关注女性运动员的特殊需求，制定更全面的退役后健康管理方案。
items.titleZh: 我们以为你从不问：澳大利亚精英女性退役运动员健康调查的见解
items.summaryZh: 一项针对澳大利亚精英女性退役运动员的调查，揭示了她们在心理、脑部、心血管、肌肉骨骼健康和总体幸福感方面的长期状况，突显了此前研究中对女性运动员代表性不足的问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey of elite retired Australian female athletes reveals long-term challenges in mental, brain, cardiovascular, and musculoskeletal health. In sports rehabilitation, you must address the unique needs of female athletes and develop more comprehensive post-retirement health management plans.

items.title: The impacts of common chronic disease on autophagy and cellular stress during exertional heat stress in peripheral blood mononuclear cells of older males.
items.summary: This study investigated how common chronic diseases in older males impact autophagy and cellular stress during exertional heat stress in peripheral blood mononuclear cells, showing age-related declines.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了老年男性慢性病对运动性热应激期间自噬和细胞应激的影响，提示慢性病可能影响老年人在运动中的生理适应。在设计老年患者康复方案时，应充分考虑其慢性病史，调整运动强度和环境，以优化安全性与有效性。
items.titleZh: 常见慢性病对老年男性运动性热应激期间外周血单核细胞自噬和细胞应激的影响
items.summaryZh: 本研究调查了老年男性常见慢性病如何影响运动性热应激期间外周血单核细胞的自噬和细胞应激，结果显示存在年龄相关的衰退。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores the impact of common chronic diseases on autophagy and cellular stress during exertional heat stress in older males, suggesting that chronic conditions may affect physiological adaptation during exercise in older adults. When designing rehabilitation programs for geriatric patients, you must fully consider their chronic disease history and adjust exercise intensity and environment to optimize safety and effectiveness.

items.title: Defining nonresponse to pulmonary rehabilitation by threshold scores for personality traits: a population-based study.
items.summary: A population-based study aimed to define optimal threshold scores for personality traits associated with the risk of nonresponse to inpatient pulmonary rehabilitation, expanding on existing knowledge.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了人格特质与肺康复无反应之间的关系，并试图定义阈值。这提示你，除了生理因素，心理特质也可能影响康复效果。在进行肺康复评估时，可将患者的人格特质作为辅助考量，以优化干预策略，提高依从性。
items.titleZh: 通过人格特质阈值评分定义肺康复无反应：一项基于人群的研究
items.summaryZh: 一项基于人群的研究旨在通过人格特质的阈值评分定义住院肺康复的无反应者，从而扩展了现有知识。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explored the relationship between personality traits and nonresponse to pulmonary rehabilitation, attempting to define thresholds. This suggests that psychological traits, in addition to physiological factors, may influence rehabilitation outcomes. When assessing for pulmonary rehabilitation, you can consider a patient's personality traits as an auxiliary factor to optimize intervention strategies and improve adherence.

items.title: Holistic management of symptom burden in fibrosing interstitial lung diseases (F-ILDs).
items.summary: This review summarizes current evidence for holistic symptom burden management in fibrosing interstitial lung diseases (F-ILDs), emphasizing comprehensive supportive care alongside antifibrotic treatment to improve patient-reported symptoms and quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述强调了对纤维化间质性肺病（F-ILDs）患者进行全面症状管理的重要性，即使疾病修饰疗法能延缓生理衰退。在临床实践中，你应认识到抗纤维化治疗不足以改善所有患者报告的症状，并应积极整合支持性护理和多学科干预来提升患者的生活质量。
items.titleZh: 纤维化间质性肺病（F-ILDs）症状负担的整体管理
items.summaryZh: 本综述总结了纤维化间质性肺病（F-ILDs）症状负担整体管理的现有证据，强调在抗纤维化治疗的同时进行全面支持性护理，以改善患者报告的症状和生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review emphasizes the importance of comprehensive symptom management for patients with fibrosing interstitial lung diseases (F-ILDs), even when disease-modifying therapies slow physiological decline. In clinical practice, you must recognize that antifibrotic treatment alone is insufficient to improve all patient-reported symptoms and actively integrate supportive care and multidisciplinary interventions to enhance patients' quality of life.

items.title: Comparative effects of dry needling on spasticity, balance, and cortical excitability in stroke and multiple sclerosis patients: A pilot study.
items.summary: A pilot study compared the effects of dry needling on spasticity, balance, and cortical excitability in stroke and multiple sclerosis patients, exploring its utility despite known pathophysiological differences.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步研究比较了干针疗法对卒中和多发性硬化症患者痉挛、平衡和皮层兴奋性的影响，提示干针可能在神经源性痉挛管理中发挥作用。尽管是试点研究，样本量小，但它为干针在神经康复领域的应用提供了早期线索，值得你继续关注后续更大型的研究。
items.titleZh: 干针疗法对卒中和多发性硬化症患者痉挛、平衡和皮层兴奋性的比较效果：一项试点研究
items.summaryZh: 一项试点研究比较了干针疗法对卒中和多发性硬化症患者痉挛、平衡和皮层兴奋性的影响，探索其在已知病理生理差异下的效用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot study compared the effects of dry needling on spasticity, balance, and cortical excitability in stroke and multiple sclerosis patients, suggesting a potential role for dry needling in neurogenic spasticity management. Although it's a small pilot study, it provides early clues for dry needling applications in neurorehabilitation, warranting your continued attention to larger follow-up studies.

items.title: Rethinking Health System Readiness for Frailty Management: Frontline Perspectives from Indonesia and Malaysia.
items.summary: This study explores frontline perspectives on health system readiness for frailty management in Indonesia and Malaysia, highlighting challenges in recognizing vulnerability and ensuring equitable care in developing countries.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究从一线视角审视了印尼和马来西亚卫生系统在虚弱管理方面的准备情况，揭示了发展中国家在老年康复服务面临的挑战。这促使你反思在不同卫生资源背景下如何更有效地提供虚弱综合管理，并推动政策层面的改进。
items.titleZh: 重新思考卫生系统对虚弱管理的准备：来自印度尼西亚和马来西亚的一线视角
items.summaryZh: 本研究从一线视角探讨了印度尼西亚和马来西亚卫生系统在虚弱管理方面的准备情况，强调了发展中国家在识别脆弱性和确保公平护理方面面临的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study examines the readiness of health systems in Indonesia and Malaysia for frailty management from a frontline perspective, revealing challenges faced by developing countries in geriatric rehabilitation services. This prompts you to reflect on how to more effectively provide comprehensive frailty management in diverse health resource contexts and push for policy-level improvements.

items.title: Orthopaedic Trauma Management in Developing Countries: A Narrative Review of Clinical Practices, Socioeconomic Challenges, and Healthcare Outcomes.
items.summary: A narrative review from 2015 to 2025 synthesized evidence on orthopedic trauma management in developing countries, examining epidemiological patterns, clinical practices, systemic constraints, and socioeconomic determinants.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述深入探讨了发展中国家骨科创伤管理的临床实践、社会经济挑战和医疗结果。它提醒你，在这些地区开展康复工作时，必须充分考虑当地脆弱的卫生系统和有限的财政保护，以便制定更具适应性和可持续性的干预方案。
items.titleZh: 发展中国家骨科创伤管理：临床实践、社会经济挑战和医疗结果的叙述性综述
items.summaryZh: 一篇2015年至2025年的叙述性综述综合了发展中国家骨科创伤管理的证据，审视了流行病学模式、临床实践、系统层面限制和社会经济决定因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review delves into clinical practices, socioeconomic challenges, and healthcare outcomes of orthopedic trauma management in developing countries. It reminds you that when conducting rehabilitation work in these regions, you must fully consider the local fragile health systems and limited financial protection to develop more adaptive and sustainable intervention programs.

items.title: Association Between Outpatient Physical Therapist Personality and Patient Management Outcomes: A Preliminary Study.
items.summary: A preliminary cross-sectional study investigated whether outpatient physical therapist personality traits are associated with patient management outcomes, suggesting non-medical factors' impact.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步研究探讨了门诊物理治疗师人格特质与患者管理结果之间的关联，提示了非医学因素对患者康复的重要性。这提醒你在团队建设和专业发展中，应关注治疗师的沟通能力和情商，这些软技能可能对患者依从性和最终效果产生积极影响。
items.titleZh: 门诊物理治疗师人格特质与患者管理结果的关联：一项初步研究
items.summaryZh: 一项初步横断面研究调查了门诊物理治疗师人格特质是否与患者管理结果相关联，提示了非医学因素的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This preliminary study explores the association between outpatient physical therapist personality traits and patient management outcomes, suggesting the importance of non-medical factors in patient rehabilitation. This reminds you that in team building and professional development, you should focus on therapists' communication skills and emotional intelligence, as these soft skills can positively impact patient adherence and ultimate outcomes.

items.title: Finding Voice: Experiences of Underrepresented Minority Faculty in Physical Therapist Education: A Qualitative Study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the experiences of underrepresented minority faculty in US physical therapist education, identifying challenges like unpaid responsibilities, marginalization, and advancement barriers.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了美国物理治疗教育中少数族裔教师面临的挑战和障碍，例如额外无偿责任和边缘化。这提醒你，在推动物理治疗教育多样性和包容性方面，行业仍有大量工作要做，以确保培养的专业人才更好地代表服务人群。
items.titleZh: 发现声音：美国物理治疗师教育中少数族裔教师的经历：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了美国物理治疗师教育中少数族裔教师的经历，指出了包括额外无偿责任、边缘化和晋升障碍等挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study reveals the challenges and barriers faced by underrepresented minority faculty in US physical therapist education, such as additional unpaid responsibilities and marginalization. This reminds you that the profession still has much work to do in promoting diversity and inclusion in physical therapy education to ensure that trained professionals better represent the populations they serve.

items.title: Retrospective analysis of guideline-based massage therapy in primary care for musculoskeletal disorders.
items.summary: A retrospective analysis explored guideline-based massage therapy in primary care for musculoskeletal disorders, noting its potential but highlighting the need for more robust evidence.
items.curatedReason: 本回顾性分析探讨了按摩疗法在初级保健中治疗肌肉骨骼疾病的潜在作用，但并未提供强有力的证据。在考虑按摩疗法时，仍需将其作为辅助手段，并基于更高级别的证据进行决策。
items.titleZh: 初级保健中基于指南的按摩疗法对肌肉骨骼疾病的回顾性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性分析评估了在初级保健中使用按摩疗法治疗肌肉骨骼疾病的情况，指出其可能有用但缺乏强有力证据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective analysis explores the potential role of massage therapy for musculoskeletal disorders in primary care but doesn't provide strong evidence. When considering massage therapy, continue to view it as an adjunct and base decisions on higher-level evidence.

items.title: Risk factors analysis of poor prognosis in ICU-admitted children with severe influenza pneumonia: a retrospective case-control study.
items.summary: A retrospective case-control study of 139 pediatric ICU patients with severe influenza pneumonia identified independent prognostic risk factors for adverse outcomes to guide early risk stratification and intervention.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究探讨了重症流感肺炎儿童的预后风险因素，虽然主要面向ICU管理，但其中涉及的并发症和预后指标对儿童康复医师在评估和管理这类患者时仍有参考价值。
items.titleZh: 重症流感肺炎ICU患儿预后不良的危险因素分析：一项回顾性病例对照研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对139名重症流感肺炎ICU患儿的回顾性病例对照研究，识别了预后不良的独立风险因素，旨在指导早期风险分层和及时临床干预。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study examines prognostic risk factors for adverse outcomes in children with severe influenza pneumonia admitted to the ICU. While primarily for ICU management, the complications and prognostic indicators are still relevant for pediatric rehabilitation specialists in assessing and managing these patients.

items.title: Parental factors influencing children's oral health in Saudi Arabia: a narrative review.
items.summary: A narrative review examined the influence of parental factors (knowledge, attitudes, practices, education, socioeconomic status, and psychological factors) on children's oral health outcomes in Saudi Arabia.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述虽然关注的是儿童口腔健康，但强调了父母知识、态度、行为和经济社会地位对儿童健康结果的广泛影响。这提醒我们，在儿童康复中，家庭干预和父母参与的重要性不容忽视。
items.titleZh: 沙特阿拉伯父母因素对儿童口腔健康的影响：一项叙述性综述
items.summaryZh: 一项叙述性综述考察了沙特阿拉伯父母的知识、态度、行为、教育、社会经济地位和心理因素对儿童口腔健康结果的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: While focused on children's oral health, this review highlights the broad impact of parental knowledge, attitudes, behaviors, and socioeconomic status on child health outcomes. This reminds you that the importance of family intervention and parental involvement in pediatric rehabilitation cannot be overlooked.

items.title: Differences in Segmental β Response between Elastic and Muscular Arteries: A Comparison between Young and Adults.
items.summary: This study compared segmental β response differences between elastic and muscular arteries in young and adult individuals, contributing to understanding age-related arterial stiffness indicators like CAVI.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究比较了年轻人和成年人弹性动脉与肌肉动脉的节段β反应差异，对理解血管硬度指标CAVI和β在不同年龄段的生理意义有帮助。虽然不直接指导康复干预，但提供了评估老年人心血管健康背景知识。
items.titleZh: 弹性动脉和肌肉动脉节段β反应的差异：青年与成年人的比较
items.summaryZh: 本研究比较了青年人与成年人弹性动脉和肌肉动脉之间的节段β反应差异，有助于理解CAVI等动脉硬度指标的年龄相关性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study compares segmental β response differences between elastic and muscular arteries in young and adult individuals, aiding understanding of the physiological significance of arterial stiffness indicators (CAVI and β) across age groups. While not directly guiding rehabilitation interventions, it provides background knowledge for assessing cardiovascular health in older adults.

items.title: Feasibility of assessing implicit motor imagery after dry needling in bilateral patellofemoral pain with kinesiophobia.
items.summary: This study assessed the feasibility of evaluating implicit motor imagery performance in individuals with bilateral patellofemoral pain and high kinesiophobia after dry needling intervention.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了对髌股关节疼痛伴运动恐惧症患者进行干针后评估内隐运动意象的可行性。尽管是可行性研究，但它拓宽了你对PFP和运动恐惧症机制的理解，并为未来的干针研究提供了潜在的评估指标。
items.titleZh: 评估干针疗法后双侧髌股关节疼痛伴运动恐惧症患者内隐运动意象的可行性
items.summaryZh: 本研究评估了在干针疗法后，对伴有运动恐惧症的双侧髌股关节疼痛患者进行内隐运动意象评估的可行性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explored the feasibility of assessing implicit motor imagery after dry needling in patellofemoral pain patients with kinesiophobia. Although a feasibility study, it broadens your understanding of PFP and kinesiophobia mechanisms and provides potential assessment metrics for future dry needling research.

items.title: Role of Prehabilitation in Improving Outcomes after Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: Prehabilitation for ACL reconstruction is a rehabilitation program aimed at improving patient outcomes by addressing knee instability and loss of function prior to surgery, potentially reducing recovery delays.
items.curatedReason: ACL重建术前康复的证据等级仍在提升。这项前瞻性研究是评估术前干预对患者预后影响的又一积极信号，提示你应该在门诊流程中考虑更积极地整合术前康复方案，尤其关注减少术后恢复的延迟。
items.titleZh: ACL重建术前康复在改善预后中的作用
items.summaryZh: ACL重建术前康复旨在通过术前干预解决膝关节不稳定和功能丧失，可能减少术后恢复延迟，从而改善患者预后。
items.curatedReasonEn: The evidence for ACL prehabilitation continues to grow stronger. This prospective study is another positive signal for pre-surgical intervention, suggesting you should consider integrating more proactive prehabilitation protocols into your outpatient workflow, particularly to mitigate delayed post-op recovery.

items.title: Smartphone-Based Semi-Immersive Virtual Reality Enhances Upper Extremity Function in Subacute Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=60) found that smartphone-based semi-immersive virtual reality, when augmented with conventional physical therapy, significantly improved upper extremity function in subacute stroke patients compared to conventional therapy alone.
items.curatedReason: 这项RCT证实，基于智能手机的半沉浸式VR能显著增强亚急性卒中患者的上肢功能。这是一项低成本且易于部署的技术，提示你应积极探索将其整合到常规物理治疗方案中，以提高任务特异性训练效果和神经可塑性。
items.titleZh: 基于智能手机的半沉浸式虚拟现实技术可增强亚急性卒中患者上肢功能：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=60）发现，与单独进行常规物理治疗相比，结合智能手机半沉浸式虚拟现实技术能显著改善亚急性卒中患者的上肢功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT confirms that smartphone-based semi-immersive VR significantly enhances upper extremity function in subacute stroke patients. As a low-cost and easily deployable technology, you should actively explore integrating it into conventional physical therapy protocols to improve task-specific training and neuroplasticity.

items.title: Integrating neurocognitive strategies into rehabilitation after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: A clinical practice-oriented narrative review.
items.summary: This narrative review emphasizes integrating neurocognitive strategies into ACL reconstruction rehabilitation to address movement breakdowns in cognitively demanding sport environments, aiming for more consistent and successful return to sport.
items.curatedReason: ACL重建后运动员回归运动（RTS）失败率高，往往与认知功能障碍而非单纯力量不足有关。这篇综述提醒你，术后康复方案必须整合神经认知策略，解决决策、注意力、反应时间等问题，才能真正帮助运动员安全且高效地重返竞技场。
items.titleZh: 将神经认知策略整合到前交叉韧带重建术后康复中：一项以临床实践为导向的叙述性综述
items.summaryZh: 这篇叙述性综述强调将神经认知策略整合到前交叉韧带重建术后康复中，以解决认知要求高的运动环境中的运动障碍，旨在实现更稳定和成功的重返运动。
items.curatedReasonEn: High RTS failure rates after ACLR are often linked to neurocognitive deficits, not just strength. This review reminds you that post-operative rehab protocols must integrate neurocognitive strategies to address issues like decision-making, attention, and reaction time, truly helping athletes safely and effectively return to play.

items.title: Effectiveness of manual therapy on physical and mental health promotion in adults: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis found manual therapy to be effective in promoting physical and mental health in adults, relieving tension, improving circulation, and regulating physiological states across various conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析有力地证实了手法治疗在促进成人身心健康方面的有效性。它提供了高质量的证据，支持将手法治疗作为综合康复方案的重要组成部分，不仅用于缓解疼痛和运动障碍，还应拓展到更广泛的健康促进领域。
items.titleZh: 手法治疗在促进成人身心健康方面的有效性：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析发现，手法治疗在促进成人身心健康方面有效，可缓解紧张、改善循环并调节各种病理生理状态。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis powerfully confirms the effectiveness of manual therapy in promoting adult physical and mental health. It provides high-quality evidence supporting manual therapy as a crucial component of comprehensive rehabilitation protocols, not only for pain relief and movement disorders but also for broader health promotion.

items.title: Effect of pelvic floor muscle training with or without dynamic neuromuscular stabilization-based breathing on menstrual pain and symptoms of primary dysmenorrhea: a randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=66) found that pelvic floor muscle training combined with Dynamic Neuromuscular Stabilization-based breathing significantly reduced menstrual pain and improved quality of life in women with primary dysmenorrhea.
items.curatedReason: 盆底肌训练结合DNS呼吸法对原发性痛经的改善是显著且全面的，不只止痛，还提高了生活质量。在女性健康康复中，你应积极考虑将这种联合干预作为一线方案，特别是对那些对传统止痛药效果不佳的患者。
items.titleZh: 盆底肌训练联合或不联合基于动态神经肌肉稳定术的呼吸练习对原发性痛经症状和疼痛的影响：随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=66）发现，盆底肌训练结合动态神经肌肉稳定术（DNS）呼吸练习，能显著减轻原发性痛经患者的月经疼痛并改善生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pelvic floor muscle training combined with DNS-based breathing significantly and comprehensively improves primary dysmenorrhea, not just pain, but also quality of life. In women's health rehab, you should actively consider this combined intervention as a first-line option, especially for patients with suboptimal responses to traditional analgesics.

items.title: Early versus conventional postoperative rehabilitation after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty: a systematic review of functional outcomes and complications.
items.summary: A systematic review comparing early (≤14 days) versus delayed (≥28 days) rehabilitation after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty found no significant differences in functional outcomes or complications.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述提供了关键证据：反式全肩关节置换术（rTSA）后早期康复（≤14天）在功能预后上与延迟康复（≥28天）无显著差异，且并发症未增加。这意味着你应该调整术后康复方案，鼓励患者更早开始活动，以期缩短恢复期。
items.titleZh: 反式全肩关节置换术后早期与常规术后康复：功能预后和并发症的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述比较了反式全肩关节置换术后早期（≤14天）与延迟（≥28天）康复，发现功能预后和并发症无显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review provides crucial evidence: early rehabilitation (≤14 days) after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty (rTSA) shows no significant difference in functional outcomes compared to delayed programs (≥28 days), with no increased complications. This means you should adjust your post-operative rehab protocols to encourage earlier activity, aiming to shorten recovery periods.

items.title: The association between cognitive inhibitory control and language performance in post-stroke aphasia: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis found a significant association between cognitive inhibitory control and language performance in individuals with post-stroke aphasia.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析证实了认知抑制控制与卒中后失语症患者语言表现的密切关联。这强化了你在失语症康复中应重视对认知抑制控制的评估和干预，以期更全面地改善语言功能。
items.titleZh: 认知抑制控制与卒中后失语症语言表现的关联：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析发现，认知抑制控制与卒中后失语症患者的语言表现之间存在显著关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis confirms the strong association between cognitive inhibitory control and language performance in post-stroke aphasia patients. This reinforces that you should prioritize assessing and intervening on cognitive inhibitory control in aphasia rehabilitation to achieve more comprehensive language function improvement.

items.title: Whole-body vibration-based interventions and dynamic balance in older patients with stroke: a systematic review and multilevel meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and multilevel meta-analysis demonstrated that whole-body vibration (WBV) interventions significantly improved dynamic balance in older patients with stroke, also identifying potential moderators.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析有力地支持了全身振动（WBV）干预对老年卒中患者动态平衡的改善作用。它还探索了潜在的调节因素和剂量反应关系。在临床实践中，你应该考虑将WBV作为辅助手段纳入老年卒中患者的平衡训练方案中。
items.titleZh: 全身振动干预与老年卒中患者动态平衡的关系：一项系统综述和多层荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和多层荟萃分析表明，全身振动（WBV）干预显著改善了老年卒中患者的动态平衡，并识别出潜在的调节因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis strongly supports the positive effect of whole-body vibration (WBV) interventions on dynamic balance in older stroke patients, also exploring potential moderators and dose-response relationships. In clinical practice, you should consider incorporating WBV as an adjunct into balance training programs for geriatric stroke patients.

items.title: Are There Sex Disparities in Return to Sport After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction? A Systematic Review and Exploratory Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and exploratory meta-analysis (n=48 studies) found that female athletes may exhibit lower return-to-sport rates after primary ACL reconstruction compared to male athletes, indicating sex disparities.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析揭示了ACL重建后重返运动（RTS）在性别上的差异，女性运动员RTS率可能低于男性。这提示你在康复计划中，要充分考虑性别特异性因素，并为女性运动员提供更个性化、全面的RTS支持，以减少这些差异。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后重返运动是否存在性别差异？一项系统综述和探索性荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和探索性荟萃分析（n=48项研究）发现，初次ACL重建后，女性运动员的重返运动率可能低于男性运动员，表明存在性别差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis reveals sex disparities in return-to-sport (RTS) rates after ACL reconstruction, with female athletes potentially having lower RTS rates than males. This suggests you must fully consider sex-specific factors in rehabilitation planning and provide more individualized, comprehensive RTS support for female athletes to mitigate these disparities.

items.title: Comparative effects of different intensities of aerobic and resistance exercise on glycemic control and cardiorespiratory fitness in middle-aged older patients with type 2 diabetes: a network meta-analysis.
items.summary: A network meta-analysis compared the effects of different intensities of aerobic and resistance exercise on glycemic control and cardiorespiratory fitness in middle-aged and older patients with type 2 diabetes.
items.curatedReason: 这项网络荟萃分析为中老年2型糖尿病患者的运动处方提供了重要依据。它比较了不同强度有氧运动和阻力训练对血糖控制和心肺适能的综合效果，提示你可以根据患者具体情况，更精准地选择运动类型和强度，以优化治疗效果。
items.titleZh: 不同强度有氧运动和阻力运动对中老年2型糖尿病患者血糖控制和心肺适能的比较效应：一项网络荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项网络荟萃分析比较了不同强度有氧运动和阻力运动对中老年2型糖尿病患者血糖控制和心肺适能的效应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This network meta-analysis provides crucial evidence for exercise prescriptions in middle-aged and older adults with type 2 diabetes. It compares the combined effects of different intensities of aerobic and resistance exercise on glycemic control and cardiorespiratory fitness, suggesting you can more precisely select exercise type and intensity based on individual patient conditions to optimize treatment outcomes.

items.title: How direct access to physiotherapy reshapes GP gatekeeping for musculoskeletal care in primary care: an exploratory organisational typology across health systems.
items.summary: This qualitative study explores how direct access to physiotherapy models redistribute GP gatekeeping for musculoskeletal conditions, characterizing physiotherapists' organizational roles across different health systems.
items.curatedReason: 物理治疗师直接诊疗模式正在重塑初级保健中全科医生的肌肉骨骼疾病转诊角色。了解不同卫生系统下物理治疗师的组织作用配置，有助于你优化执业模式，并在跨学科协作中争取更多话语权。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师直接诊疗如何重塑初级保健中全科医生对肌肉骨骼疾病的转诊：一项跨卫生系统的探索性组织类型学研究
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了物理治疗师直接诊疗模式如何重新分配全科医生在肌肉骨骼疾病方面的转诊职责，并描绘了不同卫生系统中物理治疗师的组织角色。
items.curatedReasonEn: Direct access physiotherapy is reshaping GP gatekeeping for MSK conditions in primary care. Understanding organizational role configurations of physiotherapists in various health systems helps you optimize practice models and advocate for greater interdisciplinary autonomy.

items.title: The relationship between social frailty and self-care ability in elderly stroke patients: the mediating role of self-efficacy.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study (n=291) found that self-efficacy mediates the relationship between social frailty and self-care ability in elderly stroke patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了老年卒中患者的社会衰弱与自理能力下降之间的关联，并指出自我效能感是重要的中介因素。这意味着在老年卒中康复中，你不仅要关注躯体功能，更要融入心理社会支持，通过提升患者的自我效能感来改善其自理能力，对抗社会衰弱。
items.titleZh: 老年卒中患者社会衰弱与自理能力的关系：自我效能感的中介作用
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究（n=291）发现，自我效能感在老年卒中患者的社会衰弱与自理能力之间起中介作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals an association between social frailty and decreased self-care ability in elderly stroke patients, identifying self-efficacy as a crucial mediator. This means that in geriatric stroke rehabilitation, you must not only focus on physical function but also integrate psychosocial support, improving patients' self-efficacy to enhance their self-care ability and combat social frailty.

items.title: Bilateral cerebellar intermittent theta-burst stimulation combined with laryngeal elevation training promotes neurorestoration in post-stroke dysphagia.
items.summary: This study suggests that combining bilateral cerebellar intermittent theta-burst stimulation with laryngeal elevation training can promote neurorestoration and improve swallowing function in post-stroke dysphagia patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究展示了双侧小脑间歇性theta-burst刺激（iTBS）结合喉部抬高训练在卒中后吞咽困难神经修复中的潜力。虽然还需要进一步的临床验证，但它提示你可以在难治性吞咽困难患者中探索神经调控与传统训练结合的方案。
items.titleZh: 双侧小脑间歇性theta-burst刺激联合喉部抬高训练促进卒中后吞咽困难神经修复
items.summaryZh: 本研究表明，双侧小脑间歇性theta-burst刺激联合喉部抬高训练可促进卒中后吞咽困难患者的神经修复并改善吞咽功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study demonstrates the potential of bilateral cerebellar intermittent theta-burst stimulation (iTBS) combined with laryngeal elevation training for neurorestoration in post-stroke dysphagia. While further clinical validation is needed, it suggests you could explore combining neuromodulation with traditional training for intractable dysphagia patients.

items.title: Rehabilitation Protocols Following Patellar Instability Surgery: A Structured Review of Published Recommendations and AI Generated Guidance.
items.summary: This structured review evaluates postoperative rehabilitation protocols for patellar instability surgery, comparing published recommendations against guidance generated by artificial intelligence platforms.
items.curatedReason: 髌骨不稳手术后康复方案的审查，首次对比了已发表建议和AI生成指导。你应关注AI在康复方案制定中的潜力，但也要审慎评估其与循证实践的差距，避免盲目采纳，始终将患者个体化需求和最新证据置于首位。
items.titleZh: 髌骨不稳手术后康复方案：已发表建议和AI生成指导的结构化综述
items.summaryZh: 本结构化综述评估了髌骨不稳手术后的康复方案，并对比了已发表建议与人工智能平台生成的指导。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review of patellar instability surgery rehabilitation protocols is the first to compare published recommendations with AI-generated guidance. You should pay attention to AI's potential in rehab protocol development, but also critically evaluate its discrepancies from evidence-based practice. Avoid blind adoption; always prioritize individualized patient needs and the latest evidence.

items.title: The Effect of Duration of Supervised Rehabilitation on Outcomes Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction: A Systematic Review.
items.summary: A systematic review aimed to elucidate the associations between the duration of supervised rehabilitation and functional outcomes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR), including re-injury risk.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述探讨了ACL重建后监督下康复的时长对预后的影响。了解监督康复与功能结局的关联，有助于你优化康复流程，确定何时可安全过渡到独立训练，以及如何最大化患者收益并减少再损伤风险。
items.titleZh: 监督下康复时长对前交叉韧带重建术后预后的影响：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述旨在阐明监督下康复时长与前交叉韧带重建术后功能结局（包括再损伤风险）之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review investigates the impact of supervised rehabilitation duration on outcomes after ACL reconstruction. Understanding the association between supervised rehab and functional outcomes helps you optimize rehab processes, determine safe transitions to independent training, and maximize patient benefits while reducing reinjury risk.

items.title: Community-Based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) Program for Youth with Cerebral Palsy: A Prospective Cohort Pilot Study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort pilot study (n=12) demonstrated that a 12-week community-based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) program improved goal performance, gross motor function, and anaerobic capacity in youth with cerebral palsy.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列试点研究表明，社区为基础的阻力强化个人训练（RIPT）项目能有效改善脑瘫儿童的粗大运动功能、目标表现和生活满意度。这支持了将高强度、目标导向的阻力训练整合到社区康复中，以促进脑瘫儿童的长期功能独立性。
items.titleZh: 社区为基础的阻力强化个人训练（RIPT）项目对脑瘫青少年的影响：一项前瞻性队列试点研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列试点研究（n=12）表明，为期12周的社区为基础的阻力强化个人训练（RIPT）项目改善了脑瘫青少年的目标表现、粗大运动功能和无氧能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort pilot study indicates that a community-based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) program effectively improves gross motor function, goal performance, and satisfaction in youth with cerebral palsy. This supports integrating high-intensity, goal-oriented resistance training into community rehabilitation to foster long-term functional independence in children with CP.

items.title: Psychometric properties, acceptability, and feasibility of the Stability, Agility, Strength (SAS) Mat for balance assessment with potential for training.
items.summary: This study assessed the psychometric properties, acceptability, and feasibility of the Stability, Agility, Strength (SAS) Mat for tandem balance assessment and training, demonstrating good test-retest reliability and concurrent validity (ICC > 0.70).
items.curatedReason: SAS Mat在平衡评估方面的心理测量学特性良好，且具有训练潜力。这项研究验证了其信效度，提示你可以在临床中尝试使用SAS Mat进行跌倒风险评估和平衡训练，尤其适用于老年患者，以克服传统平衡测试的局限性。
items.titleZh: 稳定性、敏捷性、力量（SAS）垫用于平衡评估的心理测量学特性、可接受性和可行性，并具有训练潜力
items.summaryZh: 本研究评估了稳定性、敏捷性、力量（SAS）垫在串联平衡评估和训练中的心理测量学特性、可接受性和可行性，结果显示出良好的重测信度和并行效度（ICC > 0.70）。
items.curatedReasonEn: The SAS Mat demonstrates good psychometric properties for balance assessment and has training potential. This study validates its reliability and validity, suggesting you could consider using the SAS Mat clinically for fall risk assessment and balance training, especially in older patients, to overcome the limitations of traditional balance tests.

items.title: Complex interplay between disease and aerobic exercise training on vascular function in an exacerbated emphysema rat model.
items.summary: An animal study using an exacerbated emphysema rat model revealed complex interplay between COPD disease and aerobic exercise training on vascular function, demonstrating inconsistent effects despite exercise benefits in healthy subjects.
items.curatedReason: 这项动物研究深入探讨了COPD和有氧运动训练对血管功能的复杂相互作用。尽管是动物模型，但它提供了对COPD患者运动生理学机制更深层次的理解，提示你应继续重视有氧运动在COPD管理中的作用，并关注其对全身并发症的潜在影响。
items.titleZh: 疾病与有氧运动训练对加重型肺气肿大鼠模型血管功能的复杂相互作用
items.summaryZh: 一项使用加重型肺气肿大鼠模型的动物研究揭示了慢性阻塞性肺病（COPD）与有氧运动训练对血管功能的复杂相互作用，表明尽管运动对健康个体有益，但在COPD模型中效果不一致。
items.curatedReasonEn: This animal study delves into the complex interplay between COPD and aerobic exercise training on vascular function. While an animal model, it provides a deeper understanding of the exercise physiology mechanisms in COPD patients, suggesting you should continue to prioritize aerobic exercise in COPD management and pay attention to its potential impact on systemic complications.

items.title: Pathophysiology, diagnosis, and management of discogenic low back pain: a phenotype-driven precision framework for surgical and interventional decision-making.
items.summary: This review outlines a phenotype-driven precision framework for discogenic low back pain (DLBP), addressing its heterogeneous pathophysiology and guiding surgical and interventional decision-making beyond empirical stepwise strategies.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述提出了椎间盘源性下腰痛（DLBP）的精准医学框架，强调了其异质性病理生理学。理解DLBP的不同表型有助于你更精准地选择康复策略，无论是运动、手法还是结合微创干预，都应以机制为导向，而非经验主义。
items.titleZh: 椎间盘源性下腰痛的病理生理学、诊断和管理：一个表型驱动的精准框架用于外科和介入决策
items.summaryZh: 本综述提出了椎间盘源性下腰痛（DLBP）的表型驱动精准框架，探讨其异质性病理生理学，并指导外科和介入决策，超越了经验性的分步策略。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review proposes a phenotype-driven precision framework for discogenic low back pain (DLBP), emphasizing its heterogeneous pathophysiology. Understanding different DLBP phenotypes helps you select rehabilitation strategies more precisely, whether exercise, manual therapy, or minimally invasive interventions, always guided by mechanisms rather than empiricism.

items.title: Inconsistencies in care: a UK and Ireland survey exploring acute vestibular service provision in adult major trauma centres.
items.summary: A UK and Ireland survey revealed inconsistencies in acute vestibular service provision within adult major trauma centers for traumatic brain injury patients, citing healthcare professionals' limited knowledge and skills.
items.curatedReason: TBI后前庭功能障碍普遍存在，但服务提供不一致。这项英国和爱尔兰的调查揭示了创伤中心急性前庭服务存在的知识和技能限制。这提示你需要更积极地倡导和推动早期筛查与干预，同时关注相关知识的专业培训。
items.titleZh: 护理不一致：一项英国和爱尔兰调查探讨成人主要创伤中心急性前庭服务提供情况
items.summaryZh: 一项英国和爱尔兰的调查揭示，成人主要创伤中心为颅脑损伤患者提供急性前庭服务存在不一致，原因在于医疗专业人员知识和技能有限。
items.curatedReasonEn: Vestibular dysfunction is common post-TBI, yet service provision is inconsistent. This UK and Ireland survey reveals knowledge and skill limitations in acute vestibular services at trauma centers. This signals your need to advocate for and drive earlier screening and intervention, while also focusing on professional training in this area.

items.title: Association Between Postoperative Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test Scores and Length of Hospital Stay in Patients with Chronic Subdural Hematoma: A Prospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study (n=77) found a significant association between lower postoperative Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) scores and a longer length of hospital stay in patients with chronic subdural hematoma.
items.curatedReason: Mini-BESTest评分与慢性硬膜下血肿术后住院时间显著相关。这项前瞻性队列研究强化了Mini-BESTest作为平衡功能评估工具的临床实用性，提示你应将其纳入术后评估流程，可能有助于早期识别风险并优化出院计划。
items.titleZh: 术后Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test评分与慢性硬膜下血肿患者住院时间的关系：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列研究（n=77）发现，慢性硬膜下血肿患者术后Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test（Mini-BESTest）评分越低，住院时间越长，二者存在显著关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Mini-BESTest scores are significantly associated with length of hospital stay post-chronic subdural hematoma surgery. This prospective cohort study reinforces the clinical utility of Mini-BESTest as a balance assessment tool, suggesting you should integrate it into post-operative evaluations to potentially identify risks early and optimize discharge planning.

items.title: Prevalence of knee pain and factors influencing its risk in ambulatory chronic stroke survivors.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 212 ambulatory chronic stroke survivors in Vietnam found a high prevalence of knee pain (33.5%) and identified associated factors, including age and stroke severity.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后步态改变引起的膝关节疼痛很普遍，且显著影响康复和生活质量。这项研究为我们描绘了慢性卒中幸存者膝痛的流行率及相关因素。你应该将膝关节疼痛评估作为常规筛查，并将其纳入卒中患者的综合康复管理中。
items.titleZh: 慢性卒中幸存者膝关节疼痛的患病率及其风险影响因素
items.summaryZh: 一项针对越南212名慢性卒中幸存者的横断面研究发现，膝关节疼痛患病率高达33.5%，并确定了包括年龄和卒中严重程度在内的相关影响因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Knee pain due to post-stroke gait alterations is prevalent and significantly impacts rehabilitation and quality of life. This study outlines the prevalence and associated factors of knee pain in chronic stroke survivors. You should integrate knee pain assessment as a routine screening and incorporate it into the comprehensive rehabilitation management of stroke patients.

items.title: Accelerometry-derived physical activity following Achilles tendon rupture: A prospective cohort study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study (n=42) used accelerometry to track physical activity levels for 12 months after Achilles tendon rupture, correlating these objective measures with patient-reported outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究利用加速计客观评估了跟腱断裂后患者在第一年的身体活动水平，并探讨了与患者报告结果（PROMs）的关联。它提供了重要的基线数据，提醒你在评估跟腱断裂患者康复进展时，不仅要依赖PROMs，还应考虑客观的活动量指标。
items.titleZh: 跟腱断裂后通过加速计评估身体活动：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列研究（n=42）利用加速计跟踪跟腱断裂后12个月的身体活动水平，并将这些客观测量结果与患者报告的结局相关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study objectively assessed physical activity levels in patients during the first year after Achilles tendon rupture using accelerometry and explored its association with patient-reported outcomes (PROMs). It provides crucial baseline data, reminding you that when evaluating rehab progress for Achilles tendon rupture, you should consider objective activity metrics in addition to PROMs.

items.title: Differences in Psychological Readiness and Quadriceps Strength Symmetry Based on Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction Graft Type in Military Academy Cadets.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of military academy cadets (n=120) found differences in psychological readiness and quadriceps strength symmetry based on ACL reconstruction graft type (autograft vs. allograft).
items.curatedReason: ACL重建后移植物类型对心理准备和股四头肌力量对称性的影响，是指导康复方案的重要考量。这项针对军事院校学员的研究表明，不同移植物类型可能影响这些关键恢复指标，提示你在制定个体化康复计划时，应将移植物选择纳入考量。
items.titleZh: 军事院校学员前交叉韧带重建术后不同移植物类型对心理准备和股四头肌力量对称性的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项针对军事院校学员的横断面研究（n=120）发现，前交叉韧带重建术后，不同移植物类型（自体移植物与同种异体移植物）对心理准备和股四头肌力量对称性存在差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: The impact of ACL reconstruction graft type on psychological readiness and quadriceps strength symmetry is a critical consideration for guiding rehabilitation protocols. This study on military cadets suggests different graft types may affect these key recovery metrics, indicating you should consider graft choice when developing individualized rehab plans.

items.title: Lung Boost Trainer Versus Incentive Spirometer on Pulmonary Function Post COVID Hemiplegic Cerebral Palsy Children; Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=60) compared the Lung Boost Trainer and incentive spirometer in COVID hemiplegic cerebral palsy children, finding the Lung Boost Trainer significantly improved pulmonary function more.
items.curatedReason: 这项RCT对比了肺部增强训练器（Lung Boost Trainer）与激励性肺活量计在脑瘫患儿肺功能改善方面的效果。结果提示肺部增强训练可能带来更优的肺功能改善。你应该考虑将此类器械纳入儿童脑瘫患者的呼吸康复方案。
items.titleZh: 肺部增强训练器与激励性肺活量计对新冠后偏瘫型脑瘫患儿肺功能的影响：随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=60）比较了肺部增强训练器与激励性肺活量计在新冠后偏瘫型脑瘫患儿中的效果，发现肺部增强训练器能更显著地改善肺功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT compared the efficacy of the Lung Boost Trainer versus an incentive spirometer for improving pulmonary function in children with cerebral palsy. The results suggest the Lung Boost Trainer may offer superior pulmonary function improvements. You should consider incorporating such devices into respiratory rehabilitation programs for pediatric cerebral palsy patients.

items.title: Effects of Acute Aerobic Exercise and Task Repetition on the Neural Correlates of Executive Function in Young and Older Adults: A Crossover fMRI Study.
items.summary: A prospective randomized crossover fMRI study (n=17 young, n=16 older adults) explored how acute aerobic exercise and task repetition affect brain activity during task switching, showing age-related differences.
items.curatedReason: 这项fMRI交叉研究探讨了急性有氧运动和任务重复对年轻和老年人执行功能神经关联的影响。虽然是小样本研究，但它为理解运动如何调节认知提供了神经生理学基础，提示你可以在老年康复中探索运动处方对认知功能的潜在益处。
items.titleZh: 急性有氧运动和任务重复对年轻和老年人执行功能神经关联的影响：一项交叉fMRI研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性随机交叉fMRI研究（17名年轻人，16名老年人）探讨了急性有氧运动和任务重复如何影响任务切换时的大脑活动，并显示了与年龄相关的差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This fMRI crossover study investigates the effects of acute aerobic exercise and task repetition on neural correlates of executive function in young and older adults. Although a small sample, it provides neurophysiological groundwork for understanding how exercise modulates cognition, suggesting you could explore the potential cognitive benefits of exercise prescriptions in geriatric rehabilitation.

items.title: The association between upper limb function, physical exercise, and cognitive ability among empty-nest elderly in China: A cross-sectional study based on CLHLS.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study (n=7,252) in China found significant associations among upper limb function, physical exercise, and cognitive ability in empty-nest elderly, suggesting physical activity as a mediating factor.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对中国“空巢老人”的横断面研究揭示了上肢功能、体育锻炼与认知能力之间的关联。这提示你在老年康复中，特别是针对独居老年人，应重视上肢功能的维护和鼓励体育锻炼，将其视为改善认知健康的潜在途径。
items.titleZh: 中国“空巢老人”上肢功能、体育锻炼与认知能力的关系：一项基于CLHLS的横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对中国“空巢老人”的横断面研究（n=7,252）发现，上肢功能、体育锻炼与认知能力之间存在显著关联，提示体育活动可能是中介因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study on Chinese 'empty-nest elderly' reveals associations between upper limb function, physical exercise, and cognitive ability. This suggests that in geriatric rehabilitation, especially for solitary older adults, you should prioritize maintaining upper limb function and encouraging physical exercise as potential pathways to improve cognitive health.

items.title: Lard Intake Reduced Tetralinoleoyl Cardiolipin and Attenuated the Cardioprotective Effects of Exercise in Mice With Pressure Overload-Induced Heart Failure.
items.summary: An animal study found that lard intake reduced tetralinoleoyl cardiolipin and attenuated the cardioprotective effects of exercise in mice with pressure overload-induced heart failure, highlighting dietary fat's interaction with exercise.
items.curatedReason: 这项动物研究揭示了膳食脂肪摄入可能削弱运动对心力衰竭的保护作用。虽然是基础研究，但它提示你在心脏康复中，除了强调运动，还应关注患者的营养管理，特别是膳食脂肪的类型和摄入量，以优化心血管预后。
items.titleZh: 猪油摄入降低四亚油酰心磷脂并减弱运动对压力超负荷性心力衰竭小鼠的心脏保护作用
items.summaryZh: 一项动物研究发现，猪油摄入降低了四亚油酰心磷脂，并减弱了运动对压力超负荷性心力衰竭小鼠的心脏保护作用，突出了膳食脂肪与运动的相互作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This animal study reveals that dietary fat intake may attenuate the cardioprotective effects of exercise in heart failure. Although basic research, it suggests that in cardiac rehabilitation, in addition to emphasizing exercise, you should also focus on patient nutritional management, particularly the type and amount of dietary fat intake, to optimize cardiovascular outcomes.

items.title: Preventative strategies for non-contact lower limb injuries among male football players: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review mapped the range of preventative strategies used to reduce non-contact lower limb injuries among male football players, aiming to provide a comprehensive overview.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述系统地梳理了男性足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的预防策略。它为你提供了全面的证据概览，帮助你在运动康复实践中，更有效地设计和实施预防方案，降低运动员的损伤风险。
items.titleZh: 男性足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的预防策略：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述旨在绘制用于减少男性足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的预防策略范围，以提供全面的概述。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review systematically outlines preventive strategies for non-contact lower limb injuries in male football players. It provides you with a comprehensive overview of the evidence, helping you more effectively design and implement prevention programs in sports rehabilitation practice to reduce athlete injury risk.

items.title: Effectiveness of shortwave diathermy in patients with chronic low back pain: A study protocol for a randomised, single-blinded, multicentre clinical trial.
items.summary: This study protocol outlines a randomized, single-blinded, multicentre clinical trial to assess the effectiveness of shortwave diathermy in patients with chronic low back pain, despite its classification as a low-value treatment.
items.curatedReason: 虽然国际指南将短波透热疗法列为低价值治疗，但它在临床实践中仍被广泛使用。这项研究协议对慢性下腰痛患者的疗效评估，将为这一争议性疗法提供急需的、高质量的证据。在结果发布前，你应该继续审慎使用。
items.titleZh: 短波透热疗法对慢性下腰痛患者的疗效：一项随机、单盲、多中心临床试验研究方案
items.summaryZh: 尽管短波透热疗法被列为低价值治疗，本研究方案旨在通过一项随机、单盲、多中心临床试验，评估其对慢性下腰痛患者的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: While international guidelines classify shortwave diathermy as a low-value treatment, it remains widely used clinically. This study protocol for chronic low back pain will provide much-needed, high-quality evidence for this controversial modality. Continue to use it judiciously until results are published.

items.title: Peripheral Nerve Field Stimulation in the Treatment of Persistent Low Back Pain: A Retrospective Study.
items.summary: A retrospective study indicates Peripheral Nerve Field Stimulation (PNFS) may offer symptomatic relief for persistent chronic low back pain when conventional treatments fail, delivering current subcutaneously to generate paresthesia.
items.curatedReason: 虽然外周神经场刺激（PNFS）作为难治性慢性下腰痛的治疗手段有潜力，但这项回顾性研究的证据等级有限。在将其纳入临床路径时，你应保持谨慎，将其定位为传统疗法无效后的高级辅助选项。
items.titleZh: 外周神经场刺激治疗持续性下腰痛：一项回顾性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性研究显示，当传统治疗无效时，外周神经场刺激（PNFS）通过皮下电极产生感觉异常，可能为持续性慢性下腰痛提供症状缓解。
items.curatedReasonEn: While peripheral nerve field stimulation (PNFS) shows potential for intractable chronic low back pain, this retrospective study offers limited evidence. Exercise caution when integrating it into your clinical pathway, positioning it as an advanced adjunct after conventional therapies fail.

items.title: Measured and supervised physical exercise for older individuals with asthma, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease and obstructive sleep apnoea (MIOLI): protocol of a randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial protocol (MIOLI) aims to evaluate the specific effects of Nordic walking as a measured and supervised physical exercise for older individuals with asthma, COPD, and obstructive sleep apnea.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验方案将评估北欧式健走（Nordic Walking）对患有哮喘、COPD和OSA老年患者的特定影响。虽然是研究方案，但它强调了特定运动方式在老年呼吸系统疾病管理中的潜力，等待结果发布，你将获得更多证据来指导临床实践。
items.titleZh: 哮喘、慢性阻塞性肺疾病和阻塞性睡眠呼吸暂停老年患者的测量和监督体育锻炼（MIOLI）：一项随机对照试验方案
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验方案（MIOLI）旨在评估北欧式健走作为一种测量和监督体育锻炼对患有哮喘、慢性阻塞性肺疾病和阻塞性睡眠呼吸暂停老年患者的具体影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial protocol will evaluate the specific effects of Nordic Walking on older patients with asthma, COPD, and OSA. Although a study protocol, it highlights the potential of specific exercise modalities in geriatric respiratory disease management. Await the results for more evidence to guide your clinical practice.

items.title: Does resistance training make a difference to the quality of life or heart health for older adults compared to aerobic exercise? A systematic review protocol from The People's Review.
items.summary: This systematic review protocol aims to compare the effects of resistance training versus aerobic exercise on quality of life and heart health in older adults, driven by public engagement.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述方案将比较阻力训练与有氧运动对老年人生活质量和心脏健康的影响。虽然目前只是方案，但它预示着未来我们将有更明确的证据来指导老年运动处方，帮助你为患者制定更精准的训练计划。
items.titleZh: 阻力训练与有氧运动对老年人生活质量或心脏健康有何不同？一项来自“人民综述”的系统综述方案
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述方案旨在比较阻力训练与有氧运动对老年人生活质量和心脏健康的影响，该研究由公众参与驱动。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review protocol will compare the effects of resistance training versus aerobic exercise on quality of life and heart health in older adults. While currently just a protocol, it signals that we will have clearer evidence in the future to guide geriatric exercise prescriptions, helping you develop more precise training plans for your patients.

items.title: Improving facial scar outcomes: an evidence-based update.
items.summary: This review provides an evidence-based update on prophylactic and therapeutic techniques for facial scar management, including wound closure, dressings, intralesional agents, laser therapy, and radiation, relevant to ENT surgeons.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述总结了面部瘢痕管理的新证据，涵盖从预防到治疗的多种技术，包括激光治疗。虽然主要面向耳鼻喉科医生，但其中关于瘢痕成熟和治疗时机的原则对你进行物理治疗干预（如手法、压力治疗）同样具有指导意义。
items.titleZh: 改善面部瘢痕结局：循证更新
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述提供了面部瘢痕管理预防和治疗技术的循证更新，包括伤口闭合、敷料、病灶内药物、激光疗法和放射治疗，对耳鼻喉外科医生具有指导意义。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review summarizes new evidence for facial scar management, covering various techniques from prevention to treatment, including laser therapy. Although primarily for ENT surgeons, the principles on scar maturation and timing of treatment are also instructive for your physical therapy interventions (e.g., manual therapy, pressure therapy).
